overall.description: First-person vehicle journey departing a futuristic Delamain taxi depot at dusk, traveling along a wet highway through arid hills with large digital billboards. Cyberpunk 2077 game engine footage featuring ray-traced reflections and cinematic lighting against a setting sun.

events.description: exiting the covered depot canopy into open highway environment

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the Delamain depot building onto the main highway

entered.detail: Modern concrete and glass structure with illuminated 'DELAMAIN' signage on roof and teal accent lighting
Wet asphalt road with double yellow lines reflecting the sunset light
Arid rocky terrain with sparse scrub vegetation silhouetted against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic taxi depot with a prominent Delamain sign, the camera moving forward under a glass canopy. As the vehicle exits the sheltered area onto the open highway, the expansive arid landscape and distant hills become visible against the dusk sky.

events.description: large digital billboard becomes clearly visible on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: cruising along the highway at steady speed, navigating gentle right curves through the hilly terrain

entered.detail: Large illuminated digital billboard displaying 'TECHNICA' advertisement with forest imagery
Tall curved LED street lamp with bright linear light fixture

segments.scene_description: Traveling along the open highway, the vehicle moves through wide arid terrain with rocky hills on both sides. A large digital billboard for 'TECHNICA' appears in the distance on the left, growing larger as the vehicle approaches, while modern street lights line the right side of the road.

events.description: road curves left while passing close alongside the Technica billboard

agents.ego_description: navigating a leftward curve along the hillside, maintaining speed while passing the billboard structure

entered.detail: Yellow concrete curb and metal guardrail lining the right edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The highway curves leftward through the rocky terrain, bringing the vehicle close to the large Technica billboard on the left. The guard rail runs along the right edge as the road winds through the hills, with the billboard remaining visible alongside the vehicle before gradually receding into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward journey from a sheltered futuristic depot into an expansive, arid highway landscape at dusk. It begins under a glass canopy beneath a prominent Delamain sign, moving forward until the vehicle exits the depot and the view opens up to reveal distant hills and a wide horizon. As the vehicle accelerates along the open road, the scene shifts to a rocky terrain where modern street lights line the right side and a massive digital billboard for Technica emerges in the distance. The highway then curves leftward, bringing the vehicle in close proximity to the glowing billboard before the road winds further through the hills and the structure gradually recedes into the distance.
